exercises.title: Warmup: General - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Flow: calisthenics (power + skills + sissy squat) → GM2 cable block + hollow rock abs. Do not return to rings/bar after GM2 starts.

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (~7 min, log as duration):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (first heavy lift only): weighted pull-up / weighted dip — bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2; bench — empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes:
Power: 3x3 (belted). Rest 3–4 min.
Pause variation on Push B day (see that routine).
Ramp (3 warm-ups): bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets.

exercises.title: Iron Cross Hold Progression
exercises.notes: Skill tri-set A1: 3x10 s iron cross progression. Then A2 and A3 with minimal rest. 60-75 s after A3 before next round.

exercises.title: Pike Handstand Push-Up (elevated feet)
exercises.notes: Skill tri-set A2: elevated pike handstand push-up. Then A3 with minimal rest.

exercises.title: Sissy Squat (Weighted)
exercises.notes: Skill/quad tri-set A3: 3x12 (sissy stand; plate/belt or GM2 floor-platform cable). Rest 60-75 s after this exercise before the next round. Then start GM2 block (no return to rings/bar).

exercises.title: Seated Dual-Handle Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x8 seated dual-handle shoulder press on GM2. Superset with lateral raise; 0 s before H2; 60-75 s after H2 each round.

exercises.title: Lateral Raise (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x8 side delt on GM2. Paired with seated dual-handle shoulder press; 60-75 s after this exercise each round.

exercises.title: Supine Dual-Handle Chest Fly
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x12 supine dual-handle chest fly on GM2. Giant with prone incline dual-handle triceps kickback; 60-75 s after H4.

exercises.title: Prone Incline Dual-Handle Triceps Kickback (Floor)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3x15 prone incline dual-handle triceps kickback from the floor. End of fly + triceps pair; 60-75 s after kickback.

exercises.title: Hollow Rock
exercises.notes: Abs: 3×20 s on floor/yoga mat at GM2. Equipment-free; low back pressed down.

exercises.title: Warmup: General - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (~7 min, log as duration):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (first heavy lift only): weighted pull-up / weighted dip — bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2; bench — empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Pull Up (Weighted)
exercises.notes:
Power: 3x3. Rest 3–4 min. Progress +2.5 kg after a clean 3x3.
Ramp (3 warm-ups): bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets.

exercises.title: Front Lever Hold (Rings)
exercises.notes: Skill B1: Front lever hold rings 3x12 s. Paired with high pull only—full recovery before ring row block.

exercises.title: Band-assisted High Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Skill B2: Band-assisted high pull-up 3x5—pull higher than a normal pull-up (bar toward lower chest/waist). Loop a band over the bar and step/kneel into it for assistance; keep hollow line and avoid excessive kip. End of first pair—60–75 s rest, then start ring rows fresh (reduces 3-move shoulder girdle sprint).

exercises.title: Ring Row
exercises.notes: Skill B3: Ring row 3x5 (custom). Rings ~ shoulder-width; full grip; start arms and legs extended; pull elbows back until rings touch sides of chest, arms close to body; rigid plank from head to heels; finish at full arm extension. Scale by standing more upright (less horizontal). Own block (not in giant set with B1–B2)—rest 2–3 min between rounds if needed for quality. Progression: tuck front-lever row when ring rows are easy.

exercises.title: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x15 rear delt / external rotation. Superset with cable row; 60–75 s after H2.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x10 mid-back row.

exercises.title: Bicep Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy: 3x12 biceps (single after face pull / row superset). Rest 60–75 s between sets.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Abs: 3x12.

exercises.title: Warmup: General - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Day 3 conditioning — steady HR RPE 5–7. Complete the band warm-up below, then follow circuit / EMOM / L-sit / V-up notes on the following exercises.

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (~7 min, log as duration):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (first heavy lift only): weighted pull-up / weighted dip — bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2; bench — empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Ring Row
exercises.notes: Circuit round 1/3: Ring row 15 reps. Giant set with next 3 moves; 60–90 s after hollow rock.

exercises.title: Band Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Circuit: Band overhead press 15 reps (log as shoulder press template if needed).

exercises.title: Bodyweight Split Squat
exercises.notes: Circuit: Split squat pattern 12 reps/side.

exercises.title: Hollow Rock
exercises.notes: Circuit: Hollow rock 20 s. End of round—rest 60–90 s before next round.

exercises.title: Jumping Jack
exercises.notes: EMOM odd minutes: 45 s work (log 6×45 s or merge as preferred).

exercises.title: Straight Arm Band Pulldown
exercises.notes: EMOM even minutes: 15 reps (6 sets for 12 min EMOM).

exercises.title: L-Sit Hold
exercises.notes: Finisher superset C1: L-sit accumulate 60 s (e.g. 4×15 s). Then C2 with minimal rest; 60–75 s after V-ups.

exercises.title: V Up
exercises.notes: Finisher superset C2: V-ups 3x20. 60–75 s after each round before next L-sit block if alternating.

exercises.title: Warmup: General - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (~7 min, log as duration):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (first heavy lift only): weighted pull-up / weighted dip — bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2; bench — empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Bench Press (Barbell)
exercises.notes: Power: 3x3 with 2 s pause on chest each rep. ~85–90% crisp triple, ~1 RIR on first 2 sets. Ramp: empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min.

exercises.title: Chest-to-Wall Handstand Hold
exercises.notes: Handstand giant D1: Chest-to-wall hold ~25 s ×3. Then D2 → D3; 60–75 s after freestanding each round.

exercises.title: Wall Walks
exercises.notes: Handstand giant D2: Wall Walks 3x3 for line strength and control. Regress to Wall Handstand Shoulder Taps 3x6-10 total if needed. Then D3 freestanding; 60–75 s after D3.

exercises.title: Freestanding Handstand Hold
exercises.notes: Handstand giant D3: Freestanding HS 15 s ×3. End of handstand triplet—60–75 s after this before hypertrophy.

exercises.title: Prone Incline Cable Y-Raise
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x12 prone incline cable Y-raise on the same low incline bench setup as H2. Thumbs up, raise in a Y, keep ribs down. Minimal rest before incline press; 60-75 s after H2.

exercises.title: Incline Bench Press (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x12 low incline on bench with GM2 cables (~30-45°). End of prone incline Y-raise + incline press giant.

exercises.title: Overhead Triceps Extension (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x15 long-head triceps. Single after Y-raise/incline giant—**60–75 s** between sets.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Abs: 3x15. Single finisher.

exercises.title: Warmup: General - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (~7 min, log as duration):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (first heavy lift only): weighted pull-up / weighted dip — bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~70% × 2; bench — empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Bar Muscle Up
exercises.notes: Power: 3x3 strict muscle-ups (first slot on Pull B). Rest 3–4 min. Warm up with easier variations or singles as needed—do not superset power work.

exercises.title: Back Lever Tuck Hold
exercises.notes: Skill pair S1a: Archer pull-up 3x4/side. Paired with back lever tuck (S1b)—minimal rest between moves; **60–75 s** after S1b.

exercises.title: Back Lever Tuck Hold
exercises.notes: Skill pair S1b: Back lever tuck 3x12 s (log on front lever hold template).

exercises.title: Nordic Hamstrings Curls
exercises.notes: Skill S2: Nordic curl 3x6—own block after archer / lever pair (hamstrings + different hinge line than Pull A). Rest **90 s** if needed for quality.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Wide Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x10. Superset with reverse fly—alternate row pattern with rear delt (60–75 s after H2).

exercises.title: Rear Delt Reverse Fly (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x15.

exercises.title: Reverse Grip Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x8 vertical pull on GM2 (supinated/parallel)—supinated slot vs Pull A pronated work. Single; **60–75 s** between sets.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Abs: 3x12 finisher.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Grip
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — back + biceps.
Warm-up: 1x10 band pull-aparts before starting.
3x10 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with bicep curl; 60–75 s after curl.

exercises.title: Bicep Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: 3x12 @ RPE 8–9. 60–75 s after each round.

data.title: Mini Pull B: Pulldown & Face Pull

exercises.title: Straight Arm Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — lats + rear delts.
Warm-up: 1x10 band dislocates before starting.
3x15 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with face pull; 60–75 s after face pull.

exercises.title: Face Pull
exercises.notes: 3x15 @ RPE 8–9. 60–75 s after each round.

data.title: Mini Pull C: Wide Row & Reverse Fly

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Wide Grip
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — back + rear delts.
Warm-up: 1x10 band pull-aparts before starting.
3x10 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with reverse fly; 60–75 s after reverse fly.

exercises.title: Rear Delt Reverse Fly (Cable)
exercises.notes: 3x15 @ RPE 8–9. 60–75 s after each round.

exercises.title: Cable Fly Crossovers
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — chest + triceps.
Warm-up: 1x10 band dislocates + 1x8 push-ups before starting.
3x12 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with OH triceps extension; 60–75 s after extension.

exercises.title: Overhead Triceps Extension (Cable)
exercises.notes: 3x15 @ RPE 8–9. 60–75 s after each round.

data.title: Mini Push B: OHP & Lateral Raise

exercises.title: Band Overhead Press
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — shoulders (front + side delts).
Warm-up: 1x10 band overhead press before starting.
3x8 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with lateral raise; 60–75 s after lateral raise.

exercises.title: Lateral Raise (Cable)
exercises.notes: 3x12 @ RPE 8–9. 60–75 s after each round.

data.title: Mini Push C: Incline & Hammer Curl

exercises.title: Incline Bench Press (Cable, Gym Monster 2)
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — upper chest + biceps.
Warm-up: 1x8 at light weight before starting.
3x12 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with hammer curl; 60–75 s after hammer curl.

exercises.title: Hammer Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: 3x12 @ RPE 8–9. 60–75 s after each round.

data.title: Mini Legs A: BSS & Calf Raise

exercises.title: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — quads + calves.
Warm-up: 1x10 bodyweight squats before starting.
3x8/side @ RPE 8–9. Superset with calf raise; 60–75 s after calf raise.

exercises.title: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 3x12 @ RPE 8–9. Floor or low block. 60–75 s after each round.

data.title: Mini Legs B: Sissy Squat & Ham Curl

exercises.title: Sissy Squat (Weighted)
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — quads + hamstrings.
Warm-up: 1x10 bodyweight squats before starting.
3x12 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with ring ham curl; 60–75 s after ham curl.

exercises.title: Hamstring Curl (Rings)
exercises.notes: 3x12 @ RPE 8–9. Supine/bridge on floor, heels in rings. 60–75 s after each round.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — abs.
No warm-up needed.
3x15 @ RPE 8–9. Superset with L-sit; 60 s after L-sit.

exercises.title: L-Sit Hold
exercises.notes: 3x15 s. Floor or low bars. 60 s after each round.

exercises.title: Chest-to-Wall Handstand Hold
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — handstand skill.
Warm-up: 1x10 band dislocates + wrist circles before starting.
3x20–30 s. Superset with freestanding hold; 60–75 s after freestanding.

exercises.title: Freestanding Handstand Hold
exercises.notes: 3x15 s. Clean line. 60–75 s after each round.

exercises.title: Back Lever Tuck Hold
exercises.notes:
Mini routine — lever skill.
Warm-up: 1x5 pull-ups + 1x10 band pull-aparts before starting.
Front lever hold 3x12 s. Superset with back lever tuck; 60–75 s after back lever.

exercises.title: Back Lever Tuck Hold
exercises.notes: Back lever tuck hold 3x12 s (logged on front lever template). 60–75 s after each round.
